source: Illinois Commerce Commission (The Liberty Consulting Group audit)
source_note: Illinois Commerce Commission — 'Management Audit of Commonwealth Edison Company Ethics and Compliance, Final Report', prepared for the ICC by The Liberty Consulting Group (July 17, 2023, 159 pp). Independent management audit of ComEd's ethics and compliance program, commissioned by the ICC. No ICC docket number surfaced on the landing page; left null rather than guessed. Page 1 verified 2026-07-10: 'Management Audit of Commonwealth Edison Company Ethics and Compliance Final Report ... Presented by: The Liberty Consulting Group. July 17, 2023'. Listed for reference (metadata-only).
